footer.description: Brazil's largest project dedicated to visibility, pride, and accessibility for people with disabilities within the LGBTI+ community.
footer.wcag: Developed in compliance with WCAG 2.2 guidelines and the Brazilian Electronic Government Accessibility Model (eMAG).

home.heroTitle2: in Brazil dedicated to people with disabilities who are
home.heroLead: Our journey began in 2020 with the mission to map accessible venues (Vale Maps), and we grew by producing anti-ableist content on Instagram. Today, Vale PcD is an innovative and highly accessible NGO focused on generating positive impact in the areas of Healthcare, Inclusive Employment, and Venue & Event Accessibility.
home.sectionSubtitle: Working at the intersection of mental health, spatial inclusion, and knowledge dissemination.
home.cardSaudeDesc: Remote psychotherapy sessions at social, affordable rates tailored specifically for the PCD and/or LGBTI+ community. We offer remote care nationwide (including support in LIBRAS - Brazilian Sign Language).
home.cardMapsDesc: The first nationwide collaborative map providing detailed information about physical and attitudinal accessibility features in venues and establishments across the country.
home.cardConscientizacaoDesc: Access our free digital library of practical guides and informative resources to stay ahead with best practices for the inclusion and accessibility of people with disabilities.
home.actionsSubtitle: Actively participate in our initiatives by supporting us as an individual donor or corporate partner.
home.cardDonateDesc: Your financial contribution directly subsidizes mental health care for low-income LGBTI+ people with disabilities, in addition to maintaining our venue mapping platforms and educational guide production.
home.cardCorporateTitle: Accessibility is More Than a Duty
home.cardCorporateDesc: It is a real opportunity for innovation and social responsibility for your business. We offer 360º mentorship, keynotes, strategic panels, and inclusive recruiting strategies.

about.historyTitleEnd: with the desire to transform the reality of LGBTI+ people with disabilities
about.p1: Vale PCD was born out of the realization that there was no collective addressing the intersectionality of people with disabilities who are LGBTI+, nor was this topic being factored in within the broader community.
about.p2: We began taking shape inside the TODXS Brasil ambassador program in 2019. In 2020, with support from the Impacto Program, we officially launched Vale and secured the resources to propel the project forward.
about.p3: Today, our entire executive board and content creators are LGBTI+ individuals with disabilities, making us a benchmark in inclusion and specialized advocacy for both communities.
about.missionDesc: To foster visibility and inclusion for LGBTI+ people with disabilities within the community through key initiatives and awareness campaigns across social media platforms.
about.visionDesc: To be a benchmark in accessibility and empower LGBTI+ people with disabilities to socialize within the community, occupying spaces so they can be seen and fully included.
about.valuesDesc: Respecting plurality and emphasizing the protagonist role of individuals as social and intersectional subjects.
about.mediaDesc: Check out the interview broadcasted by TV Pernambuco with Priscila Siqueira, co-founder of Vale PCD, speaking about inclusion, representation, and the history of the collective.

services.title: Our Solutions for
services.lead: We operate at the intersection of diversity, inclusion, and digital accessibility. We connect brands, people, and genuine anti-ableist culture.
services.corporateHeading: How We Drive Your Business Forward:
services.corporateSubheading: Accessibility is more than a duty - It is a true opportunity for your company.
services.mentorshipDesc: Our expertise spans Diversity & Inclusion research, Employer Branding, and strategic roadmaps to make products and customer experiences fully accessible. Our advisory covers products, leadership, employees, HR, community, partners, and D&I affinity groups.
services.talksDesc: Our consultants bring thought-provoking ideas and practical solutions on Diversity, Inclusion, and Employee Experience with an intersectional focus, acting as vital catalysts for D&I mindset shifts in your business.
services.conversationsDesc: We moderate flat, highly collaborative discussions tailored to your corporate needs. We prioritize authentic conversations that spark genuine knowledge exchanges and resolve employee D&I doubts.
services.panelsDesc: Shared, dynamic workshops led by multiple specialized consultants. We merge D&I theory with first-person lived experiences at the intersection of LGBTI+ and disability, going far beyond standard training.
services.jobsDesc: Our digital reach goes far beyond industry bubbles. Supported by an engaged community of thousands of followers nationwide, we amplify your employer brand with tailored creative D&I content to connect diverse talent to your team.
services.portfolioLead: We have developed physical, communicational, and attitudinal accessibility audits and on-site consulting at some of Brazil's largest music and cultural festivals.
services.metricLabel: Major national festivals and events made accessible with Vale PCD
services.ctaTitle: Be part of this transformation with Vale
services.portfolioLead: Below, we highlight some of the main national projects, festivals, and tours that featured accessibility curation by Vale PCD.

privacy.introLead: At Vale PCD, we respect your privacy and protect your personal data. We have drafted this document to explain how we process and protect your Personal Data, what your rights are, and how you can exercise them. If you have any questions, please contact us through the channels indicated in Section 9 of this Privacy and Cookies Policy.

topics.t1: 1. Basic Concepts: What you need to know to understand this Policy
topics.t2: 2. How Vale PCD collects Personal Data
topics.t3: 3. What data is processed and for what purposes

item1.title: 1. Basic Concepts: What you need to know to understand this Policy
item1.intro: You have the right to privacy and the protection of your personal data. To help with this, we present some essential concepts:
item1.legalBasesDesc: These are the legal grounds that authorize the processing of Personal Data, such as consent, contract performance, or legal obligation.
item1.cookiesDesc: Small files that help understand how you interact with Vale PCD's platforms, making your experience more efficient.
item1.analyticsDesc: Information about the use of websites and applications to understand user behavior.
item1.deviceDesc: Information collected by cookies or similar technologies, such as IP address, date and time of access, location, and browser type.
item1.personalDesc: Information that identifies a person, such as name, ID, CPF, phone number, or email.
item1.platformsDesc: Vale PCD's applications, websites, and platforms.

item2.title: 2. How Vale PCD collects Personal Data
item2.desc: Your data is collected when you interact with us, such as when filling out forms, contacting us, making purchases, participating in events, or using our services. We also collect data through cookies, which are essential for website functionality.

item3.title: 3. What data is processed and for what purposes
item3.desc: We process data such as name, email, CPF, browsing data, payment data, among others. Purposes include accessing platforms, analytics, marketing, among others, always under the appropriate legal bases.

item4.title: 4. Who Vale PCD shares data with
item4.desc: We do not share your data with any company or partners of Vale PCD, always respecting legal bases and ensuring the protection of your data.

item5.title: 5. When Vale PCD transfers data to other countries
item5.desc: We may transfer data to other countries with adequate protection, always in compliance with data protection laws.

item6.title: 6. What are the rights of the data subject
item6.desc: You have the right to confirm, access, rectify, delete, object, request anonymization, blocking, elimination, portability, withdraw consent, and obtain information about the shared use of data. Please submit your request through our

item7.title: 7. How long the data will be stored
item7.desc: Data is kept for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes, including legal obligations.

item8.title: 8. What are the responsibilities of Vale PCD and how your data is protected
item8.desc: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data against security incidents. Despite this, we cannot guarantee absolute security due to external factors.

item9.title: 9. How to contact Vale PCD about your data
item9.desc: If you have any questions, please get in touch through our

item10.title: 10. How and when this Policy can be modified
item10.desc: This Policy may undergo updates. Relevant changes will be communicated.

psychotherapy.title: Accessible Psychotherapy | Vale PCD
psychotherapy.description: Affordable online psychotherapy project for people with disabilities (PCD) and/or LGBTI+. Care, welcoming, and accessibility.

psychotherapy.title: Vale PCD Psychotherapy:
psychotherapy.p1_start: Caring for mental health is an act of resistance, especially when we are part of communities that face daily barriers. Knowing this, our NGO created
psychotherapy.p1_end: , a project designed to offer a safe, accessible, and high-quality space for the PCD and/or LGBTI+ population.
psychotherapy.p2: Our mission is to democratize access to psychotherapy, ensuring that our experiences and intersectionalities are respected, understood, and welcomed without judgment.
psychotherapy.historyLead: Since our birth in 2021, the project has been transforming realities and building bridges for emotional well-being. The impact of our work is reflected in the results:
psychotherapy.stat1Label: people registered and welcomed by the project.
psychotherapy.stat3Label: of continuous dedication to the mental health of our communities.
psychotherapy.teamLead: Vale PCD Psychotherapy is coordinated and executed by a team of 6 highly qualified, diverse individuals aligned with our causes.
psychotherapy.teamDesc: More than psychology professionals, we are a team that understands firsthand and theoretically the complexities, challenges, and beauty of being PCD and LGBTI+. This representation ensures humanized, empathetic care with a real focus on the specific demands of our community.
psychotherapy.howDesc: The project offers more affordable psychotherapy sessions, ensuring there are no barriers to self-care and psychological treatment.
psychotherapy.howHighlight: Mental health is not a luxury, it is a right. If you are PCD and/or LGBTI+ and are looking for a therapeutic process that truly sees you as a whole, you are in the right place.
psychotherapy.ctaTitle: Want to be part of this change?
psychotherapy.ctaDesc: Whether as a patient or a supporter, your place is here with us.
psychotherapy.btnRegister: I want to sign up for the project

camila.bio: Born in Recife, psychologist and neuropsychologist. Curious by nature, passionate about travel, fan of Lana Del Rey and guardian of 12 cats.

wendy.bio: 31 years old, LGBTI+ woman, person with disabilities (PCD) and from Northeast Brazil, autistic and gifted/talented (AHSD) with a hyperfocus on psychology and animals, radical leftist and fashion graduate.

deyvison.bio: 28 years old, neurodivergent psychologist who loves hiking, listening to music, and reading.

lucas.bio: 29 years old, LGBTI+, psychologist passionate about people. Pizza, books, and crochet? I'm in!

jackson.bio: Psychologist passionate about human behavior, crazy about games, beginner crocheter, series and good conversations. Between sessions: science, humanization and many spoilers (without context).

benoit.bio: 30 years old, LGBTI+, PCD (person with disabilities), love my pets, arts, books and nature.
